Most Recent Work

01
Sugoi Mart

Homepage Redesign & Section Architecture

Designed and built a modular section system replacing static, dev-dependent page builds. The new architecture lets non-technical teams construct and launch pages directly in Shopify Theme Customizer — no page builder, no dev ticket. Also shipped the full homepage redesign including multi-slide hero carousel, category tiles, and promotional sections.

Cursor / AI Coding Shopify Liquid Theme Architecture Dev Handoff Docs

02
Sugoi Mart

About Us & Why Choose Us Pages

Built two brand pages from Figma designs using AI-assisted coding. Each section is a self-contained, reusable Liquid component — content editable in Theme Customizer, layout controlled in code. Both pages are live and fully responsive.

Cursor / AI Coding Figma → Liquid Responsive
Visit live site →
03
Sugoi Mart

Native Bundle Selector

Built a native Buy More, Save More volume discount selector — replacing a third-party app. Supports up to 3 collection-based bundle groups with per-group discount tiers, inventory validation, and automatic fallback logic. Quantity override integrates directly into the existing ATC flow with no breaking changes. Shipped with full developer handoff documentation.

Shopify Liquid + JS AOV Optimization App Replacement Live in Production
04
Bokksu

International Order Tracking Widget

Designed and built a branded, multi-state order tracking experience for international shipments. Handles 7 tracking states (Preparing → Delivered) plus a stalled overlay, with contextual messaging at each stage. Built to reduce "where is my order" support tickets by giving customers clear, human-readable status instead of raw carrier codes.

HTML / CSS / JS CX Reduction Tool Multi-state UI Bokksu Branded
View live demo →
Live at bokksu.com
05
Bokksu

Shopify Plus Platform Operations

Directed full Shopify Plus organization migration consolidating five storefronts, including a payment infrastructure migration across Stripe, Braintree, Shopify Payments, and Recharge — coordinated with Shopify Professional Services. Managed a distributed dev team across multiple time zones throughout. Also began migration of Bokksu homepage from Builder.io to native Shopify before the role ended.

Shopify Plus Orgs Payment Migration Multi-storefront Remote Dev Team

About

Builder by habit,
operator by trade.

Started in customer experience and spent 7 years building up through operations into ecommerce at Bokksu — a Japanese DTC brand running six Shopify storefronts across subscription, marketplace, and wholesale models.

No formal technical background. Learned Shopify by running it, learned to code by shipping things. Recently started building production features with Cursor and AI-assisted coding — and writing the handoff docs afterward.

Best in environments where there's real work to be done, not decks to be made.
